title: Speed-to-value message lands in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: April Gong sample shows 17 of 27 discovery calls restated the speed-to-value frame, versus 19% for platform consolidation.
connect: ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins this quarter.
body: April Gong sample shows 17 of 27 discovery calls restated the speed-to-value frame, versus 19% for platform consolidation. ICP-aligned wins close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins this quarter.
trace: Discovery call resonance data shows positioning frame adoption with cycle time correlation from ICP match patterns.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logos

body: Q2 2026 new logo wins show 28 of 36 deals matching ICP criteria, up from 64% in Q1. Refreshed positioning closed mid-market at 31% win rate this quarter.

title: Beacon Systems win rate doubles to 64% head-to-head

title: Battlecard adoption jumps to 61% on competitive deals

trace: Battlecard utilization pattern shows correlation with pipeline generation from launch asset adoption data.
